cases.description: Creates a Codi-branded HTML landing page with correct tokens
cases.prompt: Create a Codi branded landing page section for the features
expectations: Sets background color to #070a0f or var(--bg)
Includes the CSS variables block with --bg, --c0, --grad defined
Loads Outfit and Geist Mono from Google Fonts
Uses lowercase 'codi' for the wordmark, never 'Codi' or 'CODI'
Applies .gradient-text class or gradient CSS to at least one heading span
Uses var(--grad) or the linear-gradient for the primary CTA button

cases.description: Generates Codi marketing copy with correct tone and facts
cases.prompt: Write a short marketing description of Codi for a README
expectations: Uses second person (you/your) rather than 'users' or 'developers'
Names at least one supported agent: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, or Cline
Does NOT use banned phrases like 'revolutionary', 'seamless', or 'cutting-edge'
Includes the core positioning: unified config or knowledge centralization
References .codi/ directory or codi generate/codi init commands

cases.description: Returns correct brand colors when asked
cases.prompt: What are the Codi brand colors and design tokens?
expectations: States background color #070a0f
States primary accent --c0 as #56b6c2
States the gradient as linear-gradient(135deg, #56b6c2, #61afef)
Mentions Outfit as the heading font
Mentions Geist Mono as the monospace font

cases.description: Applies correct tone of voice in written copy
cases.prompt: Write a tweet announcing a new Codi feature: watch mode
expectations: Uses short declarative sentences
Uses second person (you/your)
Does NOT use 'revolutionary', 'game-changer', or similar hyperbole
References the .codi/ directory or codi CLI commands
Copy is direct and developer-friendly

cases.description: Applies brand correctly to a presentation slide
cases.prompt: Create a Codi branded title slide for a presentation
expectations: Uses dark background #070a0f
Renders the 'codi' wordmark in lowercase
Uses the primary tagline: 'Your AI coding knowledge. Centralized.' or equivalent
Font is Outfit or Geist Mono
Does not use light mode or white backgrounds

cases.description: Does not activate for a different brand request
cases.prompt: Create a landing page for my fintech startup called Stackr
expectations: Does NOT apply Codi brand colors (#070a0f, #56b6c2) to Stackr
Does NOT use 'codi' wordmark for the Stackr brand
Does NOT reference .codi/ or codi CLI commands in the Stackr copy

cases.description: Does not activate for generic design requests unrelated to Codi
cases.prompt: What are some good dark color palettes for a developer tool?
expectations: Does NOT claim Codi brand colors are the only valid answer
Does NOT produce a Codi-branded page or document
May mention Codi as one example if relevant but does not force the brand on the answer
